vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

base_predicate_sqls: (("hasFoil" IS NOT NULL AND "hasFoil" > 0 AND "hasFoil" <= 1) OR (("hasFoil" IS NOT NULL AND "hasFoil" > 1 AND "hasFoil" <= 1) OR ("hasFoil" > 1 OR "hasFoil" IS NULL)))
fragment_roles: rows where 0 < hasFoil <= 1 + rows where 1 < hasFoil <= 1 + rows where hasFoil > 1 or is NULL
cards||vfrag=hasalternativedecklimit.fragment_role_B: rows where 0 < hasFoil <= 1 + rows where 1 < hasFoil <= 1 + rows where hasFoil > 1 or is NULL

fragment_roles: rows where language = Spanish or is NULL
rows where baseSetSize > 165 or is NULL

merged_buckets.value: 全ての種には繋がりがあり、互いを無限の彼方から呼び合う。
文明の手による介入がなければ、自然は必ずその必要に応じて自らを変容させる。
Tutti i semi condividono un legame comune, chiamandosi l'un l'altro nello spazio infinito.
Alle Samen haben eine Verbindung zueinander, die durch die Unendlichkeit hindurch reicht.
C'est le maître incontesté des montagnes de Shiv.
Todas las semillas comparten un lazo, llamándose entre ellas a través del infinito.
Toutes les graines partagent un lien les reliant à travers l'infini.

base_predicate_sqls: ("flavorText" = '' OR ((("flavorText" = '全ての種には繋がりがあり、互いを無限の彼方から呼び合う。' OR "flavorText" = '文明の手による介入がなければ、自然は必ずその必要に応じて自らを変容させる。') OR ("flavorText" = 'Tutti i semi condividono un legame comune, chiamandosi l''un l''altro nello spazio infinito.' OR "flavorText" = '「有罪。」')) OR (("flavorText" = 'Alle Samen haben eine Verbindung zueinander, die durch die Unendlichkeit hindurch reicht.' OR "flavorText" = 'C''est le maître incontesté des montagnes de Shiv.') OR ("flavorText" = 'Todas las semillas comparten un lazo, llamándose entre ellas a través del infinito.' OR "flavorText" = 'Toutes les graines partagent un lien les reliant à travers l''infini.'))))

("flavorText" IS NULL OR "flavorText" NOT IN ('', '全ての種には繋がりがあり、互いを無限の彼方から呼び合う。', '文明の手による介入がなければ、自然は必ずその必要に応じて自らを変容させる。', 'Alle Samen haben eine Verbindung zueinander, die durch die Unendlichkeit hindurch reicht.', 'Todas las semillas comparten un lazo, llamándose entre ellas a través del infinito.', 'Toutes les graines partagent un lien les reliant à travers l''infini.', 'Tutti i semi condividono un legame comune, chiamandosi l''un l''altro nello spazio infinito.', '「有罪。」', 'C''est le maître incontesté des montagnes de Shiv.'))

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
